Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Larian]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Unsouled ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|'''Ch 11''' — Larian is a member of the Eight-Man Empire who was raised in a noble household and reached Gold rank at six years old.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 19''' — Larian is a renowned archer of the Eight-Man Empire.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 14''' — Larian is of the Eight-Man Empire.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — Larian is a blonde woman in golden armor from the Eight-Man Empire.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 22''' — Larian is a projection of her consciousness.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Larian is a character who possesses the Bow of the Silent King.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 15''' — Larian can draw power to become a Monarch.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Larian is a Monarch of the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Larian can Forge white arrows.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 17''' — Larian has sharp perception.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Larian crashed into a mountain peak near Sacred Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — Larian's golden armor was cracked and spewing spiritual essence.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 21''' — Dross threatened to haunt Larian if Lindon gave the Weeping Dragon's binding to her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 28''' — Larian is a character who arrived in bright gold armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — Larian is a figure in golden armor who carries a bow of gray driftwood.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 33''' — Larian is a character who appears at Lindon's shoulder very quickly.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
